svg.text: 虛擬資產託管系統架構圖
Virtual Asset Custody System — Three-Layer Security Architecture with Network Isolation
🔥 FIREWALL 1 — 外網防火牆 (Internet Perimeter) · Port 443 HTTPS Only
第一層 · 虛擬資產託管系統
Virtual Asset Custody Platform | 網段: 192.168.10.0/24
🔥 FIREWALL 2 — 內網防火牆 (Internal Segment) · Port 5001 / 9880 / 5432 Controlled
第二層 · HSM 中介系統
HSM Middleware Layer | 網段: 192.168.20.0/24 | Air-Gapped VLAN
後端處理模組 API Server
🔥 FIREWALL 3 — 斷網隔離防火牆 (Air-Gap Boundary)
⚡ 物理斷網 / No Network Route
第三層 · HSM 硬體加密機
Hardware Security Module Layer | 斷網Air-Gapped Zone | 網段: 192.168.30.0/24 (isolated)
Config, Ca Pri, Slot ID, Corta
Ethereum · Bitcoin · Solana · BNB Chain · Tron · Polygon · Avalanche (via walletos + keyvault-gateway)
port: 443 outbound | Firewall allow-listed RPC endpoints only
DACC Virtual Asset Custody Platform · Architecture v2.0 · Confidential & Proprietary · 2026
